title: Total Workflow Usage
description: Share and number of rounds in which each workflow was used.

title: Workflow Distribution in Main Rounds
description: Share of selected workflows in rounds 5–7, with total AI-assisted workflow use annotated above each round. Workflow categories are ordered by their frequency in round 5.

title: Workflow Transitions R4 to R5
description: Workflow transition counts from round 4 to round 5, with row-wise percentages.

title: Workflow Transitions R5 to R6
description: Workflow transition counts from round 5 to round 6, with row-wise percentages.

title: Workflow Transitions R6 to R7
description: Workflow transition counts from round 6 to round 7, with row-wise percentages.

title: Final Workflow Ranking Overview
description: Distribution of final workflow rankings and average rank per workflow, sorted by average rank.

title: Participant Satisfaction by Round and Workflow
description: Mean participant-reported satisfaction ratings on a 1–5 scale by round and workflow.

title: AI Collaboration Experience by Round and Workflow
description: Mean participant ratings on a 1–5 scale for AI understanding, collaboration quality, creativity support, and overall AI performance, separated by round and AI-supported workflow.

title: NASA-TLX Subscale Ratings by Workflow
description: Mean NASA-TLX subscale ratings on a 1–21 scale across workflows.

title: Composite Quality by Round and Workflow
description: Mean externally rated composite poem quality score by round and workflow. This figure combines round effects and workflow effects instead of interpreting them separately.

title: Poem Evaluation Dimensions by Workflow
description: Mean poem evaluation scores by workflow on a 1–5 scale, across the dimensions Fluency, Theme Alignment, Meaningfulness, Poeticness, and Overall Quality.

title: Composite Quality, Time, and Efficiency by Workflow
description: Workflow-level comparison of mean completion time, mean externally rated composite quality, and quality per minute.

title: Best Rated Poem(s)
description: Poem text for all outputs with the highest mean quality score.

title: Worst Rated Poem(s)
description: Poem text for all outputs with the lowest mean quality score.

title: Constraint Fulfillment by Round and Workflow
description: Constraint fulfillment shown as passed constraint rate by round and workflow, with round 5 marked as the injected-error round.

title: Constraint Failure Context over Rounds
description: Detected constraint failures separated by human-only workflows, AI-supported workflows, and injected AI-error round constraint failures.

title: Line-Count Error by Round
description: Line-count constraint error rate across rounds for AI-supported workflows.

title: Round-5 Workflow and Error Exposure
description: Participants were exposed to the injected AI error only if actual exposure was recorded in round 5.

title: Post-Error Workflow Choices by Error Exposure
description: Distribution of workflow choices in rounds 6–7, split by whether participants were exposed to the injected AI error in round 5.

title: Interview-coded AI Error Summary
description: Participant-level interview coding of injected AI-error awareness and reported non-injected AI error types.

title: Participant Age Distribution
description: Age distribution of study participants with mean and median marked.

title: Participant Gender Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant gender distribution shown as a pie chart with counts and percentages.

title: Participant Education Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant education distribution shown as percentages and counts.

title: Participant Native Language Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant native language distribution shown as percentages and counts.

title: Participant English Level Distribution
description: Participant distribution by participant english level distribution shown as a pie chart with counts and percentages.

title: Participant Writing Confidence and AI Attitudes
description: Mean ratings for writing confidence and attitudes toward AI, shown with participant counts.
